ItacAcademyItem.Name: Traviati (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Information on this Academy can be found in Gianluigi Betti`s biography of Giovambattista Capponi, in L`Archiginnasio, 2006.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
